theme: Mallorca — Where Q3 corporate trips go to peak

linkedin.text:
Most companies think Mallorca = beach holiday.

They're using it wrong.

Mallorca is one of the most underrated B2B destinations in Europe — and Q3 is the window most HR directors miss.

Why our clients are picking it for 2026:

🏖️ Private cove dinners on yachts that don't leave the bay — formal enough for awards, intimate enough for actual conversation
🏰 Renaissance estates (fincas) that host 80-200 people for closed-door retreats
🚴‍♂️ Tramuntana mountain cycling — pro-level routes that build the team without the cliché ropes course
🍷 Bodega tour through Binissalem wine country with the actual winemakers, not a tour guide
⛵ Catamaran day to Sa Dragonera island — phones lose signal for 4 hours (by design)

Logistics that actually matter:
→ 3.5h direct from Tel Aviv (Israir, El Al seasonal)
→ Hotels 25-30% cheaper than Ibiza or French Riviera for equivalent quality
→ June-October weather window
→ English fluency higher than Costa del Sol

The groups we've sent there came back with the same feedback: "We've done dozens of these. This one actually changed something."

Q3 has 3 weeks of usable corporate windows left in 2026. After that — 2027.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Mallorca #Spain #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #UproductionEvents #MICE #BalearicIslands #EventDestination #TeamBuilding #Q3Events
